title: Respond with JSON
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This Express route returns data with `res.send(...)`, which sends it as a plain string and omits the JSON content-type.

Change the handler to reply with `res.json(...)` so clients receive a proper JSON response. Remove the `res.send` call.
hints: `res.json(obj)` serializes the object and sets `Content-Type: application/json`.
